Script started on 2025-02-15 18:48:59+00:00 [COMMAND="timeout --preserve-status --foreground 40 swipl -x /home/runner/work/metta-wam/metta-wam/prolog/metta_lang/Sav.fv-az789-502.MeTTaLog   -- --python=enable -- --timeout=40 --output=/home/runner/work/metta-wam/metta-wam/reports/tests_output/baseline-compat --html --test tests/baseline_compat/hyperon-mettalog_sanity/unique_test.metta --halt=true  --stdin=tty --stdout=tty --stderr=tty" TERM="xterm-256color" TTY="/dev/pts/0" COLUMNS="-1" LINES="-1"]

; [ : user [load_metta_file &self tests/baseline_compat/hyperon-mettalog_sanity/unique_test.metta] ]
 (: list-to-set (-> Expression Expression))
 (= (list-to-set $_8720)  
  (collapse (unique (superpose $_8720))))
;;;; Test unique with simple duplicates
;;;; This test verifies that `unique` removes all duplicates from (a b b c c c d), resulting in [a, b, c, d].
!(assertEqual (unique (superpose (a b b c c c d))) (superpose (a b c d)))


;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.UNIQUE-TEST.01


[needed_subst_args (superpose (a b b c c c d)) a]

(184)P;HTML|[user]P;HTML| bugger:dumpST_now(2258,[max_depth(5000),numbervars(false),show([level,has_alternatives,hidden,context_module,goal,clause])]).   %  dumpst.pl:261: 
; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 4.19 seconds.

!(assertEqual (unique (superpose (a b b c c c d))) (superpose (a b c d)))

  [loonit_success 
    [equal_enough_for_test_renumbered_l strict_equals_allow_vn 
      (a b c d) 
      (a b c d)]]

Deterministic: ()
;;;; Test unique with no duplicates
;;;; This test ensures that `unique` leaves a list unchanged if it already contains only unique elements.
!(assertEqual (unique (superpose (a b c d))) (superpose (a b c d)))


;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.UNIQUE-TEST.02


[needed_subst_args (superpose (a b c d)) a]

(184)P;HTML|[user]P;HTML| bugger:dumpST_now(2258,[max_depth(5000),numbervars(false),show([level,has_alternatives,hidden,context_module,goal,clause])]).   %  dumpst.pl:261: 
; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 2.60 seconds.

!(assertEqual (unique (superpose (a b c d))) (superpose (a b c d)))

  [loonit_success 
    [equal_enough_for_test_renumbered_l strict_equals_allow_vn 
      (a b c d) 
      (a b c d)]]

Deterministic: ()
;;;; Test unique with a single element
;;;; This checks that `unique` works correctly for a single-element list, leaving it unchanged as [a].
!(assertEqual (unique (superpose (a))) (superpose (a)))


;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.UNIQUE-TEST.03


[needed_subst_args (superpose (a)) a]

(184)P;HTML|[user]P;HTML| bugger:dumpST_now(2258,[max_depth(5000),numbervars(false),show([level,has_alternatives,hidden,context_module,goal,clause])]).   %  dumpst.pl:261: 
; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.581 secs. (581.40 milliseconds) 

!(assertEqual (unique (superpose (a))) (superpose (a)))

  [loonit_success 
    [equal_enough_for_test_renumbered_l strict_equals_allow_vn 
      (a) 
      (a)]]

Deterministic: ()
;;;; Test unique with an empty list
;;;; This confirms that `unique` handles an empty list without errors, correctly returning an empty result.
!(assertEqual (unique (superpose ())) (superpose ()))


;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.UNIQUE-TEST.04

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.000638 secs. (637.98 microseconds) 

!(assertEqual (unique (superpose ())) (superpose ()))

  [loonit_success 
    [equal_enough_for_test_renumbered_l strict_equals_allow_vn () ()]]

Deterministic: ()
;;;; Test unique with all elements being the same
;;;; This verifies that when all elements are the same (a a a a), `unique` reduces it to a single element [a].
!(assertEqual (unique (superpose (a a a a))) (superpose (a)))


;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.UNIQUE-TEST.05


[needed_subst_args (superpose (a a a a)) a]

(184)P;HTML|[user]P;HTML| bugger:dumpST_now(2258,[max_depth(5000),numbervars(false),show([level,has_alternatives,hidden,context_module,goal,clause])]).   %  dumpst.pl:261: 
; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 2.48 seconds.

!(assertEqual (unique (superpose (a a a a))) (superpose (a)))

  [loonit_success 
    [equal_enough_for_test_renumbered_l strict_equals_allow_vn 
      (a) 
      (a)]]

Deterministic: ()
;;;; Test unique with nested lists
;;;; This ensures that unique identifies identical nested lists and reduces them to a single instance.
!(assertEqual (unique (superpose ((1 2) (1 2) (3 4)))) (superpose ((1 2) (3 4))))


;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.UNIQUE-TEST.06


[needed_subst_args (superpose ((1 2) (1 2) (3 4))) (1 2)]

(184)P;HTML|[user]P;HTML| bugger:dumpST_now(2258,[max_depth(5000),numbervars(false),show([level,has_alternatives,hidden,context_module,goal,clause])]).   %  dumpst.pl:261: 
; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 2.17 seconds.

!(assertEqual (unique (superpose ((1 2) (1 2) (3 4)))) (superpose ((1 2) (3 4))))

  [loonit_success 
    [equal_enough_for_test_renumbered_l strict_equals_allow_vn 
      ( (1 2) (3 4)) 
      ( (1 2) (3 4))]]

Deterministic: ()
;;;; Test unique with mixed types
;;;; This test checks that `unique` handles different data types correctly and removes duplicates while preserving the order.
!(assertEqual (unique (superpose (1 "hello" 1 "world" "hello" 3.14 3.14))) (superpose (1 "hello" "world" 3.14)))


;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.UNIQUE-TEST.07


[needed_subst_args (superpose (1 "hello" 1 "world" "hello" 3.14 3.14)) 1]
